title: British Columbia Programme Monthly Trendsheet - January 2026
content:
• In January 2026, BC LCFS average credit prices fell to CAD $127.20, the lowest level since February 2019, marking a 34.8% month-on-month decline from $195.00 in December and a 61.76% year-on-year drop from $332.66 in January 2025.
  • Credit prices traded in a CAD $95 â€“ CAD $220 range during January 2026, resulting in a CAD $125 spread.
  • In line with previous years, credit volumes decreased by 91.75% in January 2026 compared with December 2025, as December marks the end of the compliance period.
  • The month recorded an average ticket size of 4,327.6 credits per transfer, based on six transactions.
author: Adarsh Thakur
